[1] HOME [2] WRITING [3] COLOPHON [4] ASCII [5] CHANGELOG [6] ABOUT [7] LINKS [8] GALLERY [9] MUSIC

Changelog

Release history of the collective-self system. Each version is a new MOTD ── the message that greets you when you connect.

v0.1 ── 2026-02 The Pirates Got Jobs COLLECTIVE-SELF SYSTEM v0.1 Connected to port 2600 ── BBS mode active ──────────────────────────────────── Welcome back. You have been away for 30 years. The pirates never really left -- they just got jobs. Like Guybrush said: "I want to be a mighty pirate." Like Zak said: nothing. He just did the work. ──────────────────────────────────── ▶ cat statement_of_method.txt
v0.2 ── 2026-02-07 ── CURRENT The Room With the Phosphor Glow COLLECTIVE-SELF SYSTEM v0.2 Connected to port 2600 ── BBS mode active ──────────────────────────────────── You are in a dark room. A phosphor glow hums from the monitor. Exits: NORTH leads to the manifesto. EAST to the archive. On the desk: a blog engine, an RSS feed, a ticking clock. The system has been rebuilt. The old scaffolding is gone. You pick up the roadmap. It reads: "Phase 2 complete." ──────────────────────────────────── ▶ look around

Left analysis of tech and labor.

marcus + rook + claude code // 2026 ── [RSS] █
